item.title: Blackmail rings
item.description: Many politicians were groomed. Epstein got many of them with underage girls. Russia has the receipts. Trump used the footage to leverage submission to MAGA. Russia leveraged, too. How do you get so many varied conservatives from so many varied parts of the country to agree so easily? Blackmail. Billions of blackmail.
item.dc:creator: IliveINyourHEADrentFREE

item.title: The most vicious creature found in water
item.dc:creator: Fatcatstamp

item.title: Stop Killing Games - the EU petition just hit overdrive
item.description: Stop Destroying Games, the European Citizens' Initiative (ECI) against the planned obsolescence and destruction of video games, just hit its stretch goal. It collected 1'400'000 signatures! One million four hundred thousand! If you are an EU citizen, you can STILL SIGN it until the end of the month. https://eci.ec.europa.eu/045/public/#/screen/home This initiative is a petition that follows the steps of an official EU process to ask the European Commission to take action over an issue. Specifically, it asks for a way to allow people who bought a video game to be able to keep playing it after a publisher ends its support. Until not too many years ago, what this petition asks ask for was pretty much a given. Multiplayer games could also be played on the LAN and on private servers. These options are now missing in many new games, because publishers found a clever way to make us buy their new games, disabling the old ones. The initiative is written to allow publishers enough flexibility to implement different solutions (as long as they provide one) and it is not retroactive. BTW The title of the ECI is "Stop Destroying Games". The consumer protection movement is "Stop Killing Games". More info here https://www.stopkillinggames.com/faq Long form FAQ video here https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sEVBiN5SKuA

item.title: Fck me
item.description: Text wall incoming, feel free to keep scrolling. My wife made a new friend from work about 3 months ago. 1 month ago they started talking g daily because they are both into genealogy. The chats became more frequent and more intense rapidly, her entire focus shifted to him. First thing in the morning, check phone, chat with him. Last thing, in bed before turning over to sleep, text him. Now, before we got together, I never had anyone in my life other than myself to think about. For 28 years, there was only me, no one else. With my autism, I was okay with that. We had met previously on WoW (World of Warcraft) and I instantly fell for her then. Her then boyfriend told her to cut contact with me, and she reluctantly did. She was the one. The one who got away. Years later, she reached out on Facebook, she was single again and we instantly hit off, started visiting each other every month. 6 months later I moved in with her, uprooted my life to move to another country. Within a year we had a beautiful son, a year later, married, been married 8 years this August. Now, on our anniversary weekend, she had made plans to go travel a few hours away to spend a whole day with this new friend. She made the plans having forgotten, I had too when I encouraged her, to be a supportive husband. (Edit* I encouraged her and pushed her to make the plans on this date, having myself forgotten. It is very important for me that she does not come across as heartless, she is the most loving person I have ever met) When we remembered what weekend it was, she made no attempts at, or showed no interest in rescheduling because of train tickets (totalling 50 pounds) She has begun neglecting me emotionally in favor of this new person. I have expressed concerns of this, and how if elt hurt about this a couple of times already, but it always ends eith her stone walling me and going to bed. Last night, we had a wine night (we try to do this once a week) and the conversation dived into that topic again. I showed her the signs of an emotional affair, and she got upset about being able yo tick every single box, except the secrecy. (She only talks about him now. Shares their inside jokes and shows me all the things he says that makes her happy and cheerful) I expressed that if the only thing that stops them from being in a relationship is a kiss, then it is an emotional affair. She has told me they are emotionally dependant on each other. She has told me she loves him more than me, but in a different way. I didn't sleep last night. She has just now put on make up, grabbed a 1000 piece puzzle that he loves (which I bought for him as a present) and gone to his place to talk with him about how to save her relationship. (She did not specify which relationship) I am spiralling. Have been for weeks. I have not been the most attentive husband, because if autism and my entire life before her being on my own. I should have been more available. I failed her. I fear she will return to tell me that the love she still feels for me, pales in comparison to what she feels for him. Or that she will return to tell me that they have cut ties (which I told her I did not want. I just wanted to feel like I was the most important person again) and resent me for the rest of her life. I fucked up. My feelings destroyed my marriage.. Sorry for the wall of text. Thank you for reading, if you did. **update** She called me, told.me she needed a walk. I pleaded that she had not ended her friendship, and she told she had not, they would be friends for ever. I burst in to tears of joy that I had, for once, not destroyed a friendship of my wife. She needed to have a walk to clear her head, still awaiting her return for more details. She said she loved me before we said bye on the phone. I cam not believe how absolutely fucking blessed I am to have such an amazing wife. She truly, genuinely, is the best, most kind and loving person in the entire world. *which is why I got so fucking shit scared of me pushing her away) ***edit*** I need to make it clear that I wholeheartedly believe I have pushed my wife to this with years of unintentional neglect. I need everyone to understand that the title is the truth. I am the one ruining things. My wife has given her perspective in the comments and a few people have heard her and supported her, I thank you cause she needs that, I need that. I am aware I am the problem. We are talking right now on how to work through this in a healthy way. To anyone who has berated her or tried to make me feel better by attributing all blame to her, you are wrong. I am my own worst enemy in this. _ I _ am destroying my marriage, as the title says. Not her.

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #170
item.description: They can't manage what they have, yet they're building something massive. Trump stumbles from one self-inflicted crisis to the next. Whether its the Epstein follies, watching Hegseth lose his sixth senior aide in six months, or threatening global airline partnerships over routine disputes, it's easy to understand why so many of his businesses have gone bankrupt. But don't let the bumbling fool you. The Everglades Internment Center built on questionably acquired land in days has inspired them. Now, the Trump government is trying to build detention camps for 100,000 people when they can't even handle the 56,000 they're cramming into facilities built for 42,000. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed about this kind of news. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/mexican-flights-restricted 2. https://go.govbrief.today/brazilian-judge-visas 3. https://go.govbrief.today/spacex-contracts-deemed-vital 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-iran-mission-assessment 5. https://go.govbrief.today/sixth-pentagon-advisor-ousted 6. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-epstein-critics-troublemakers 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-senate-summer-resource 8. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-detention-expand-100K 9. https://go.govbrief.today/passport-planning-staff-eliminated Yesterday's Most Read - https://go.govbrief.today/federal-schedule-g-employees Fighting Back - https://www.project2025.observer/ Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
